text:
is a Scout Regiment soldier.

Appearance

Petra has ginger hair and amber-colored eyes. She wears the typical Scout Regiment uniform, with a white button-up shirt underneath.

Story

During one of his attempts to get closer to his subordinates, Erwin Smith approaches Petra from behind, which surprises her. Later, after his makeover, Erwin meets Petra and her teammates again but they are all uneasy and report their Commander's behavior to Levi.
